Home.heroTitle: Legacies that live on from generation to generation
Home.heroDescription: A place of memory, a מקום זיכרון, to remember, to share, and to carry forward a life. May their memory be a blessing — יהי זכרם ברוך.
Home.searchPlaceholder: Search for a legacy by name...
Home.howSubtitle: Create a legacy in minutes. Invite others to contribute their memories.
Home.step1Desc: Set up a legacy with photos, life story, and funeral details.
Home.step2Desc: Invite family and friends to visit the page and contribute memories.
Home.step3Desc: Collect and curate stories, eulogies, and images — all in one place.
Home.noMemorials: No legacies have been created yet. Be the first to create one.
Home.ctaTitle: Every life leaves a memory that continues
Home.ctaDescription: Create a legacy and give family and friends a place to share their stories.

About.title: About Us
About.description: LeOlam (לעולם) is a free platform for creating and sharing legacy pages — a place to honor a life, preserve memories, and connect families across generations.
About.nonprofit: LeOlam is a project of Yair LeOlam, an American non-profit (EIN 71-1024619) and Israeli non-profit (R.A. 580473734).
About.contactSubtitle: Have a question or need help? Send us a message.
About.sendError: Failed to send message. Please try again.
About.sentDescription: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you as soon as we can.
